zh.lifeSummary: Martha Lynn是James Lynn Sr.的女兒，於大約1742年出生。她於從大約1758年到1760年與John Freeman Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州韋克結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1797年9月30日在美國北卡羅來納州韋克享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Martha Lynn是James Lynn Sr.的女儿，于大约1742年出生。她于从大约1758年到1760年与John Freeman Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州韋克结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1797年9月30日在美国北卡罗来纳州韋克享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lynn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhloinn and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn ).

English: habitational name from any of several places so called in Norfolk, in particular King's Lynn, an important center of the medieval wool trade. The placename is probably from an Old Welsh word cognate with Gaelic linn ‘pool, stream’.

variants.name: Lyn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Ding, Fatt, Tov, Yol, Yun.
Scottish and English: variant of   Lynn  .
Probably also an altered form of Dutch Van der Lijn (see Vanderlinden ).

variants.name: Linn
meanings: German: habitational name from a place called Linn, named with lin ‘swamp, bog, marsh’.
German: from an ancient Germanic personal name, Linto, formed with Old High German lind(i) ‘soft’.

variants.name: Lenn
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lynn  .

variants.name: Flynn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Connor, Declan, Kieran, Aidan, Brigid, Cathal, Dermot, Donal, Eamon, John Patrick, Kiernan.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Floinn ‘descendant of Flann’, a byname meaning ‘red(dish), ruddy’. There were families of this name in various parts of Ireland. This name has also been Anglicized as Lindsay .
English: from Middle English Flin, representing the Old Norse male personal name Fleinn.

variants.name: Lynne
meanings: Scottish or English: variant of   Lynn  .

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Becomes 12th State
historicEvents.description: On November 21, 1789, North Carolina became the 12th state in the Union.

en.lifeSummary: Martha Lynn was born about 1742 as the daughter of James Lynn Sr.. She married John Freeman Sr. from about 1758 to 1760, in Wake, North Carolina, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 30 September 1797, in Wake, North Carolina, United States, at the age of 56.

ja.lifeSummary: Martha Lynnは約1742年にJames Lynn Sr.の娘として生まれた。から約1758年まで1760年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州ワクでJohn Freeman Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1797年9月30日にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ワクで56歳で死去した。

ko.Wake, North Carolina, British Colonial A: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 웨이크

ko.lifeSummary: Martha Lynn(은)는 대략 1742년 James Lynn Sr.의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1758년 부터 1760년 까지 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 웨이크에서 John Freeman Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1797년 9월 30일 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 웨이크에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Martha Lynn родилась около 1742 г. Её отца звали James Lynn Sr. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Freeman Sr. с около 1758 по 1760 в местности веик, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 30 сентября 1797 г. в местности веик, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 56 лет.
